case_title: TD BANK USA, N.A. VS. ANITA L COMMER ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 62507361), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TD BANK USA, N.A. SERVED JUL-20-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE JUL-20-2018 AS TO DEFENDANT COMMER, ANITA L
